Runtime settings watcher composes filesystem reload, validation, and desired-state reconciliation until reload is represented as an application port.
The runtime-owned egress gateway owns temporary Node HTTP/socket plumbing until the outbound transport adapter port is extracted.

Anthropic execution adapter currently consumes the host runtime spawn contract while this phase extracts provider-specific preparation behind a runtime-selected adapter; collapse to an application-owned port in the next boundary cleanup.
Anthropic memory LLM adapter reuses existing config and credential-broker access while direct SDK imports are moved out of memory; move credential runtime config behind an application port next.

OpenAI-family memory LLM adapter reuses the same credential-broker runtime config as the Anthropic memory adapter to reach the Gantry model gateway; move credential runtime config behind an application port next.
Pre-existing memory runtime dependencies on config and logging remain unchanged by the Anthropic SDK extraction.
Split from extractor-llm to keep file-size ratchet while preserving existing memory LLM config and logging dependencies.

Agent profile-file endpoints materialize visible profile mirrors and resolve the workspace folder; capped so additional adapter->runtime/config imports fail until the canonical boundary slice extracts a profile composition seam.

System control routes read draining state, settings-load state, and config directly for /readyz, /metrics, and /v1/status; capped at exact count until readiness/draining are injected through ControlRouteContext.
Settings control routes parse and import fleet settings revisions via config services directly; capped at exact count until settings parse/import is injected through ControlRouteContext.
Runtime settings revision listener composes desired-state service, settings import, and revision notify directly; capped at exact count until revision propagation is an application port.
Job execution-readiness reads config and the Postgres runtime-store directly to compute fleet readiness; capped at exact count until readiness storage access is behind a repository port.
IPC interaction processing reads the agent access policy from config/profiles for locked-agent enforcement; capped to this single import until access policy is exposed through a runtime-owned port.
Embeddable Agent Gantry package root intentionally remains a small public export barrel for local file: consumers such as Agent.Tender.
Provider adapter exports are isolated behind one narrow package barrel so the root public API can re-export them without carrying provider-specific text.
Storage service references the docker compose migrations folder path for local bootstrap; capped to this single provider-path token until the migrations source is provider-neutral.
Toolchain bake runner spawns the registry-pinned npm install child process directly for bake jobs; capped to this single call until bake execution moves through the sandbox adapter.

Incoming Teams external card action adapter reads runtime external platform hook configuration directly; capped to this one env access until the hook settings are injected through a channel adapter port.
Incoming Teams tender chat adapter reads runtime hook configuration directly; capped to this one env access until the hook settings are injected through a channel adapter port.

Incoming external notification route reads runtime signing configuration directly while rendering external platform cards; capped to this one env access until card settings are injected through route context.
Incoming external platform event route reads runtime signing and delivery configuration directly; capped to this one env access until external event settings are injected through route context.
